action.reasoning: Observation: The base model scores 0.0000 on ShowUI-desktop val, while our fine-tuned model scores 0.2949 on val but only 0.0089 on ScreenSpot-Pro test. This massive gap suggests either catastrophic forgetting of base zero-shot capabilities, severe domain shift, or a prompt/format mismatch on test. We need to quickly diagnose what the models actually output on real test samples before deciding whether to submit the base model, an intermediate checkpoint, or retry with different prompts. Analysis: Before burning ~35 min on another eval submission, a 5-10 min diagnostic on 5-10 test samples will reveal if the base model outputs reasonable <box> tags for ScreenSpot-Pro (which would suggest we should submit it) or if our fine-tuned model's outputs are malformed on test. Decision: Write and run a quick diagnostic script that inspects test prompt fields and compares raw model outputs (base vs fine-tuned, with/without system prompt) on a handful of test samples.
